description: [DEPRECATED — use dagster-soda] Run a Soda scan — one Dagster asset check per SodaCL check (community).

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Default asset key for checks not routed via asset_key_map

data_source_name.label: Data Source Name
data_source_name.description: Soda data source name (defined in configuration.yaml)

checks_yaml_paths.label: Checks YAML Path(s)
checks_yaml_paths.description: Path(s) to SodaCL YAML files. Accepts a single path or a list.

soda_configuration_path.label: Soda Configuration Path
soda_configuration_path.description: Path to the Soda configuration YAML file

asset_key_map.label: Asset Key Map
asset_key_map.description: Optional map from SodaCL dataset name → slash-separated Dagster asset key. Lets a single scan attach checks to multiple assets.

severity_override.label: Severity Override
severity_override.description: Optional — force every check to WARN or ERROR. Unset (default) means severity is read from each SodaCL check's attributes.

name: Soda Check
